content_analysis.posting_pattern: Active contributor focused on documenting the engineering lifecycle of his platform, Convoxa.
content_analysis.content_style: Technical, architectural-focused, and data-driven with a clear lean toward 'build-in-public' transparency.
content_analysis.engagement_insight: Detailed technical breakdowns and architectural problem-solving posts generate the most consistent engagement.

post_breakdown.brief_description: Discusses how poll-based engagement reduces friction compared to traditional commenting.
Reports post-launch metrics and announces job search for backend engineering roles.
Deep dive into solving database and feed latency issues for Convoxa.

posts: Product Evolution: Shares the transition from comment-heavy to poll-based engagement features.
Career Positioning: Actively leverages project metrics to secure junior backend roles in Europe.
Technical Deep Dive: Explains hybrid data models and parallel feed architectures to improve system performance.
Performance Benchmarking: Documents stress testing a Node.js backend to handle 1.9M requests on free-tier infrastructure.
